architecture.summary: Documentation-only changes to Docusaurus docs-site in specweave repo. No new pages created, only modifications to existing markdown files (reference/skills.md, skills/fundamentals.md, skills/installation.md, workflows/overview.md, guides/agent-teams-and-swarms.md). Sidebar config (sidebars.ts) updated for team-lead entry. No backend or API changes.

integrations.summary: No external integrations affected. Changes are to documentation content only. vskill install commands corrected to match actual CLI syntax. Plugin references updated to match actual marketplace.json in specweave and vskill repos.

ui-ux.summary: Dual activation examples added for better UX -- each core skill section shows both slash command and natural language invocation. Sidebar navigation improved with team-lead entry in Agent Teams category. Mermaid emoji issues fixed for cross-browser rendering.

performance.summary: No performance impact. Documentation-only changes. Docusaurus build time unaffected (no new pages, only content modifications to existing files).

security.summary: No security implications. Documentation-only changes. No credentials, tokens, or sensitive data involved. vskill install commands corrected to prevent users from running invalid commands.

edge-cases.summary: Mermaid diagrams with emoji characters may not render in all browsers -- replacing with text-only labels. Incorrect plugin names in docs could lead users to failed installs -- correcting to match actual marketplace.json. No risk of data loss or system failures.
